name: Parsnip Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the grated parsnips, chopped celery, chopped green pepper, and parsley flakes in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl or measuring cup, mix together the mayonnaise, salad oil, vinegar, lemon juice, and salt until well combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the parsnip mixture.
4. Toss lightly to ensure all ingredients are evenly coated.
5. Serve.
